content:
# Recommendations — after iter-067 (DUAL flank S3/S4a)

## HIGH — effort-break S3, do NOT re-assign as a flat prove round
S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` is reduced to a precise residual (B1+B2 legs + `ρ` cancellation done) but needs **two composition bridges the single-immersion crux does NOT supply.** Re-assigning S3 verbatim will hit the same wall (this is the planner's pre-committed reversal — now CONFIRMED by prover + both auditors). Dispatch **effort-breaker** on S3 into the dual L1/L2/L3 chain (mirror of Cone A):
- **dual-L1 (bridge b)** `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_compat` — SCP composition law over `j ≫ U.ι = V.ι` relating `SCP_{V.ι}`, `(restrict j) SCP_U`, `SCP_j`, `pullbackComp`. **Template:** S2's `pullback_tensor_map_basechange` (dual analogue) + the `pullbackValIso` reconciliation idiom at `TensorObjInverse.lean:~507–652`.
- **dual-L2 (bridge c)** `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` — θ-cocycle over `pullbackComp` relating `θ_{V.ι,M}`, `(pullback j)(θ_{U.ι,M})`, `θ_{j,M|U}`. Consumes the iter-066 crux for the per-open naturality. **Template:** S2's `pullback_tensor_map_natural` (dual analogue).
- **dual-L3** assemble S3 from the committed `dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` + B2 (done) + L1 + L2.

## HIGH — author the missing blueprint block (coverage debt, both auditors)
`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` (`TensorObjInverse.lean:~1085`) is sorry-free (`rfl`) but **UNMATCHED** — no blueprint entry, while its tensor-side twin `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` has a full one. Planner: dispatch **blueprint-writer** on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` to add `lem:dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` (dual analogue of `lem:tensorobj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbacktensormap`): `dual_restrict_iso f M = RFIP f ≪≫ sheafificationCompPullback ≪≫ sheafification.mapIso (presheafDualPullbackComparison f M)`, `\uses{lem:dual_restrict_iso, def:presheafdual_pullback_comparison}`.

## MEDIUM — strengthen S3/S4a blueprint prose (checker major #2)
The S3 blueprint proof defers its residual to "sheafification-seam closers (identical to S2)", but the in-code comment is **more precise** than the blueprint: S2's proof actually names `pullback_tensor_map_basechange` + `pullback_tensor_map_natural`, whose dual analogues are exactly bridges (b)/(c). Have blueprint-writer name the dual-L1/dual-L2 sub-lemmas in S3's prose + `\uses` (folds naturally into the effort-break above). S4a prose should state it "rides on S3 (b) + θ-unit identification (`presheafDualUnitIso_naturality`)".

## S4a — deferred, do NOT assign before S3 lands
S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` is structurally unfolded but its residual is downstream of S3's bridge (b) plus a θ-unit identification. Assign only after dual-L1 lands.

## Telescope — deferred
`trivialisation_restrict_compat` (`TensorObjInverse.lean:~1907`) gated on all 5 squares; S3/S4a open. Do not attempt until both close.

## LOW (notes)
- Stale comment `TensorObjInverse.lean:1669–1673` — old iter-066 "BLOCKER" prose, executed but uncleaned (auditor). Fold into next prover pass on the file.
- Dead end recorded: `simp/rw [Functor.mapIso_trans]` does not distribute the RHS `mapIso` in S3 (unlike S2); use `conv_rhs` in-file.
- Off-path: `PresheafDualPullback.lean` carries 2 known sorries (L263, L350) — the abandoned L1/L3a chain bypassed by the crux; not on the S3/S4a critical path.
- 119 `lean_aux` decls remain UNMATCHED in leandag (pre-existing coverage debt, not iter-specific); the one NEW this iter is `dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison` (covered above).
